key_changes: Replaced commented example code with fully implemented admin classes
Added SoftDeleteAdminMixin for filtering soft-deleted records across all models
Implemented OrganizationAdmin with custom status badges and trial indicators
Implemented UserAdmin extending BaseUserAdmin with email-based auth support
Implemented BranchAdmin with location-specific fields and status display
Implemented RoleAdmin with permission display and system role indicators
Implemented RolePermissionInline and PermissionAdmin for permission management
Implemented SessionAdmin for session tracking with user/organization display
Implemented AuditLogAdmin for audit trail visibility with action status badges

patterns_discovered.description: Reusable mixin that filters soft-deleted records from admin querysets
Custom admin display methods using format_html with color mapping for status fields
Admin actions for status updates with user feedback via message_user
Structured fieldsets with collapsible sections for timestamps and advanced settings
CustomUserCreationForm and CustomUserChangeForm for email-based authentication without username
Methods like full_name, status_badge that calculate display values from model data
Use of gettext_lazy for all user-facing strings

gotchas_discovered.details: Uses hasattr(qs.model, 'deleted_at') to check if soft delete is available, avoiding errors on models without this field
gotchas_discovered.impact: Defensive coding pattern that allows mixin reuse across different model types

gotchas_discovered.details: Django's BaseUserAdmin expects 'username' field, but custom implementation uses 'email' instead
gotchas_discovered.impact: Must completely override fieldsets and add_fieldsets to avoid trying to display non-existent username field

gotchas_discovered.details: UserAdmin uses filter_horizontal for groups and user_permissions, requiring proper widget configuration
gotchas_discovered.impact: Improves UX for managing related objects compared to default select widgets

gotchas_discovered.details: Inline classes need to be defined before being referenced in parent admin class
gotchas_discovered.impact: Code organization requirement to avoid NameError

gotchas_discovered.details: from django.utils import timezone is imported inside the method rather than at module level
gotchas_discovered.impact: Delayed import pattern, acceptable for single-use utility but could be moved to top-level imports

gotchas_discovered.details: Inline style strings in format_html can become unmaintainable; no CSS class approach used
gotchas_discovered.impact: Color and styling logic embedded in Python, harder to maintain and theme consistently

approach_outcome.description: Successfully implemented comprehensive Django admin configuration for all core models with advanced features
achievements: Converted commented example code to fully functional admin classes
Implemented soft delete filtering via reusable mixin pattern
Added visual enhancements (color badges, trial indicators, boolean icons)
Implemented 8 bulk action methods for administrative efficiency
Created custom user forms supporting email-based authentication
Added comprehensive fieldsets with collapsed advanced sections
Implemented inline editing for related permissions
Added date hierarchy and pagination for improved navigation
Provided detailed docstrings for each admin class

recommendations.suggestion: Extract inline style definitions to CSS classes or constants
recommendations.rationale: Color mappings and badge styles are duplicated across multiple admin classes; consolidating to constants or CSS would reduce duplication and improve maintainability

recommendations.suggestion: Move timezone import to module-level imports
recommendations.rationale: Delayed import in verify_email action is unconventional; move to top-level for clarity and consistency

recommendations.suggestion: Consider adding list_select_related and prefetch_related for performance
recommendations.rationale: With foreign keys to Organization and nested relationships, adding these optimizations would reduce database queries in list view

recommendations.suggestion: Document the soft delete filtering behavior in admin docstrings
recommendations.rationale: While mixin is documented, users of admin might not realize deleted records are filtered by default

recommendations.suggestion: Create admin tests to verify soft delete filtering and bulk actions
recommendations.rationale: Complex admin logic should have dedicated test coverage for filtering, actions, and display methods

recommendations.suggestion: Standardize date_hierarchy and list_per_page across all admin classes
recommendations.rationale: Currently some classes have these set while others don't; consistent UX across all admin interfaces
